ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed reading */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall reading */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Snowfall reading */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name or entity that owns the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type is a standard measurement */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the data type */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the data type */,
  "units" TEXT /* List of units that can be used for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the unit is a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval in minutes, hours, days, etc. */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the frequency is a standard frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is encrypted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions or roles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "forecast_data" TEXT /* Forecast data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "source_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used to generate the forecast */,
  "forecast_period" TEXT /* Period of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather forecast the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., severe weather, flood warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* List of affected areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES weather_forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station status */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Status message */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name or entity that updated the status */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_message" TEXT /* Maintenance message */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name or entity that performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
